sourceMovie.title: The Worst Person in the World
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto The Worst Person in the World (2021) as a drama theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The drama and romance blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Lost in Translation
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Worst Person in the World clicked for you, Lost in Translation (2003) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and romance, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Worst Person in the World?
faq.answer: Try Lost in Translation, Knocked Up, Sex and the City—each shares DNA with The Worst Person in the World while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Worst Person in the World?
faq.answer: The Worst Person in the World (2021) is best described as Drama, Romance, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Worst Person in the World worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
